perturbation.original_text: 1.2 "Business Data" means all end user data and user account details, as well as commercial records, relating to PC Financial operation of the Activity in the Territory
perturbation.changed_text: 1.2 "Business Data" means all end user data excluding user account details, as well as commercial records, relating to PC Financial operation of the Activity in the Territory
perturbation.explanation: The original definition of 'Business Data' includes 'all end user data and user account details'. By changing it to exclude 'user account details', it creates a contradiction when the contract refers to 'Business Data' elsewhere, because the reader will not know whether or not to include user account details, which can affect how Mobimagic processes the data.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Data protection. Each Party agrees to comply with all applicable data protection and privacy laws arising from its obligations, if any, under the Agreement and to reasonably co-operate with the other Party in order to allow the other Party to comply with any laws as deemed necessary from time to time. Each Party shall treat all data, information relating to Services, including but not limit to the customer personal data, as confidential. Each party warrants that it shall take appropriate technical and organizational measures against unauthorized or unlawful processing of personal data and against accidental loss or destruction of, or damage to, the personal data of the other party.
perturbation.justification: The modification to the definition of 'Business Data' creates a contradiction. Initially, 'Business Data' included 'user account details'. The changed definition now excludes 'user account details'. The 'Data protection' section requires each party to treat all data, including customer personal data, as confidential and take measures against unauthorized processing of 'personal data'. Since the definition of business data now excludes user account details, it creates ambiguity as to whether user account details are subject to the same protections as other personal data, because the reader won't know whether to include user account details within business data.

perturbation.original_text: 4.3 Mobimagic warrants that the Services provided hereunder will not infringe any legal rights and interests of any potential customers and third parties, and will not violate any provision of laws and regulations. The Services it provides pursuant to the Agreement will be provided in a good and workmanlike manner with at least the same degree of skill and competence normally practiced by professionals providing the same or similar services and PC Financial has the right to continuous review and assesses the Services provided by Mobimagic and give its necessary suggestions towards the Services. Mobimagic may take necessary corrective measures of its Services according to PC Financial's requirements.
perturbation.changed_text: 4.3 Mobimagic warrants that the Services provided hereunder will not infringe any legal rights and interests of any potential customers and third parties, and will not violate any provision of laws and regulations. The Professional Services it provides pursuant to the Agreement will be provided in a good and workmanlike manner with at least the same degree of skill and competence normally practiced by professionals providing the same or similar services and PC Financial has the right to continuous review and assesses the Services provided by Mobimagic and give its necessary suggestions towards the Services. Mobimagic may take necessary corrective measures of its Services according to PC Financial's requirements.
perturbation.explanation: By using the term 'Professional Services' instead of 'Services' in one instance, the document introduces ambiguity. It becomes unclear whether 'Professional Services' is a subset of 'Services' or refers to something entirely different. This creates uncertainty regarding the standard of care Mobimagic must provide for all services if they are not classified as Professional Services as it affects if PC financial has the right to continuous review of the Services.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Mobimagic will provide the system / platform maintenance services and data processing services to PC Financial.
perturbation.justification: The change introduces the term 'Professional Services' which is not defined. This creates a contradiction because it's unclear whether the 'system / platform maintenance services and data processing services' mentioned in the contradicted text are considered 'Professional Services'. If they aren't, the warranty and review rights in clause 4.3 might not apply, creating a contradiction regarding PC Financial's rights and Mobimagic's obligations for those specific services. The term 'Services' in the original text clearly encompassed all services, while the introduction of 'Professional Services' creates ambiguity and a potential contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 6.1 Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. PC Financial shall pay to Mobimagic a fixed service fee in the amount of 970,000 United States Dollars (USD 970,000) for each month (the "Fee") within the timeline as permitted under the prevailing India regulations. It is stipulated in this Agreement that Mobimagic will send an invoice to PC Financial on monthly basis according to the progress of the service. After PC Financial confirms that invoice contents are correct, PC Financial shall pay within 45 days after confirming thus.
perturbation.changed_text: 6.1 Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. PC Financial shall pay to Mobimagic a fixed remuneration in the amount of 970,000 United States Dollars (USD 970,000) for each month (the "Fee") within the timeline as permitted under the prevailing India regulations. It is stipulated in this Agreement that Mobimagic will send an invoice to PC Financial on monthly basis according to the progress of the service. After PC Financial confirms that invoice contents are correct, PC Financial shall pay within 45 days after confirming thus.
perturbation.explanation: Changing "fixed service fee" to "fixed remuneration" creates ambiguity. While 'Fee' is defined, 'remuneration' is not. This can lead to confusion during enforcement if there's a dispute about what the remuneration covers, impacting later sections relating to invoice and payment.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Fee provided is exclusive of Goods and Service Tax (GST) which may be levied under Reverse Charge Mechanism. Any respective taxes for each party will be the responsibility by each party. If law requires that taxes be withheld PC Financial shall (a) deduct those taxes from the Fee; (b) pay the taxes to the proper governmental body; (c) send evidence of the obligation and proof of tax payment to Mobimagic; (d) remit the Fee amount, after deductions and withholding; and (e) cooperate with Mobimagic to obtain refunds of such taxes if there Is any preferential tax treatment available.
perturbation.justification: The change from "fixed service fee" to "fixed remuneration" introduces ambiguity because 'remuneration' is not a defined term within the agreement, while 'Fee' is. The contradicted text discusses taxes applied to "the Fee". If 'remuneration' is interpreted differently than 'Fee', it could create a dispute about what amount is subject to those taxes, leading to a strong contradiction. The original text clearly defines what fee is subject to the GST tax, where the new change now causes ambiguity that can cause misinterpretation and contradiction.
